I found a relevant document called "vacation-plans.docx" that contains information about your Hawaii trip, including some initial packing items. I'll create a more comprehensive packing list based on the activities mentioned in this document and save it as "hawaii-packing-list.docx".

args.content:
# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

## Clothing
- Swimwear (at least 2 sets)
- Beach cover-ups
- Flip-flops/sandals
- Casual outfits for daily wear
- Light jacket or sweater (for cooler evenings)
- Sleepwear
- Undergarments
- Hat/cap for sun protection
- Sunglasses

## Activities & Outdoor Gear
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Hiking shoes/boots (for Diamond Head hike)
- Water shoes (for rocky beaches)
- Beach towel/quick-dry towel
- Reusable water bottle
- Day backpack
- Camera and charger (for capturing memories)
- Binoculars (for wildlife viewing)
- Kayaking gear (if not provided)

## Toiletries & Health
- Sunscreen (reef-safe, high SPF)
- After-sun lotion/aloe vera
- Insect repellent
- Basic first-aid kit
- Motion sickness medication (if needed for boat trips)
- Prescription medications
- Toiletries (toothbrush, toothpaste, shampoo, etc.)
- Hand sanitizer
- Wet wipes

## Electronics
- Phone and charger
- Portable power bank
- Camera and accessories
- Travel adapter (if needed)
- Headphones/earbuds

## Documents & Money
- Passport/ID
- Flight tickets/boarding passes
- Hotel reservation details
- Travel insurance documents
- Credit cards and cash (some local currency)
- Emergency contact information
- Itinerary printout

## Special Items
- Waterproof phone case
- Dry bag for electronics
- Reusable shopping bag
- Journal and pen
- Books or e-reader
- Gifts for the luau (if participating in cultural exchange)

## For the North Shore Road Trip
- Cooler for snacks and drinks
- Road map or offline GPS
- Snacks and water
- Beach umbrella or pop-up tent

Have a wonderful vacation in Hawaii! Remember to respect local customs and the beautiful natural environment.
